en: Salt me.
Here you are, Homer. What the?
Why are you talking like that?
The play's tomorrow night.
I've got to stay in character.
Hey, Mom, would it help if I talk like this, too? It might.
ko: 엄마, 나도 이렇게 말하면 도움이 될까? 될 수도 있지.

en: And I'll talk like this. Bob's your uncle, mate.
That really doesn't help, Bob.
ko: 그건 별로 도움 안 돼, Bob.

en: Big Daddy, would y'all mind passing a little old biscuit?
Can I slug off school tomorrow? Got a pain in me gulliver.
ko: 내일 학교 빠져도 돼? 머리가 아파.

en: I'm living in a cuckoo clock.
See you later, kids. I've got to go rehearse with Ned.
ko: 나중에 봐, 얘들아. Ned랑 리허설하러 가야 해.

en: But, Marge, what about dessert?
For God's sakes, you can pull the lid off your own can of pudding.
ko: 제발, 푸딩 캔 뚜껑 정도는 혼자 열 수 있잖아.

en: Fine. I will.
Ah! Oh, no.
My pudding is trapped forever.
So I can open my own can of pudding, can't I?
ko: 내가 푸딩 캔을 혼자 열 수 있다고?

en: Shows what you know, Marge.
Marge!
Hey, Marge!
Keep yelling, you big ape.
